title: Zoo Keeper Daily Log
text:
## Zoo Keeper Daily Log

**Date:** {day of week}

**Keeper:** {person}

**Morning feeding:** The {adjective} {animal} ate {number} pounds of {food} and {past-tense verb} the {object}.

**Enclosure check:** Found {plural noun} near the gate; repaired by {verb ending in -ing} the fence.

**Visitor incident:** A {job} tried to {verb} over the barrier and {past-tense verb} loudly.

**Health note:** One {animal} showed {emotion} after {verb ending in -ing} near the {place}.

**Closing:** All animals accounted for except the {silly word} in storage.
